# Test: apx sync — virtualenv detection and language filtering
#
# Verifies sync command behavior for Python (requires VIRTUAL_ENV) and
# unknown language rejection.

# Setup
mkdir app
cd app
exec git init
exec apx init app --org=testorg --repo=myapp --non-interactive internal/apis/proto/services/users
exec apx add proto/payments/ledger/v1@v1.2.3

# sync python without VIRTUAL_ENV should fail
! exec apx sync python
stderr 'no active virtualenv'

# sync go should succeed (updates go.work)
exec apx sync go
stdout 'go.work updated'

# sync unknown language should fail
! exec apx sync cobol
stderr 'unknown language'

# sync --clean go should succeed (clears go.work)
exec apx sync --clean go
stdout 'go.work cleared'

# sync --clean python without VIRTUAL_ENV should fail
! exec apx sync --clean python
stderr 'no active virtualenv'
